Sarnak Parrying Blade  
 

Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 16 Dmg Bonus: 35 AC: 10
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 3.0 Size: SMALL
Class: WAR RNG BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Send a correction
Post Comment
Rogues r Us
QuoteReply
# Sep 18 2003 at 12:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252821326
9 posts
I see this as a darned fine rogue weapon PERIOD. Seems to me teh tanks should have better carnage waeopns than this. Bards, seem to be able to use two slashers at once so they need light and fast. This would not be bad for them.. But For Rogue this is a darned nice item. I don't understand why a SK or Pally should not be able to use.

Someshere there is a little man with a calculator that spends 12 hours a day trying to do class balancing on every item the geeks think up.

God Spare us teh Accountants.
▲ Page top
RE: Rogues r Us
QuoteReply
# Oct 08 2003 at 8:27 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756913916
200 posts
Pally and Sk can't use it because it is a weapon, not a shield. They don't have dual wield.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 01 2003 at 9:51 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Boy this wep is sweet it is awsome for me new stone bladed stilitto just one questing what is real price on this thing i mean for the sol ro server ?
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 01 2003 at 9:49 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Sorry clicked button to fast LOL
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 01 2003 at 9:49 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post)
Good ranger weapon
QuoteReply
# Sep 23 2002 at 4:29 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592254825848
Scholar
23 posts
I dual wield this with a LSoEE now and like the combination very much. I have tried many, many 1hs weapons (Defiance, Frostbringer, Centi LS, Veno Axe, etc), and this is the first time I didn't want to bend one of my weapons around a tree. The speed is slow enough for a Ranger not to draw aggro from the MT, the ac helps, and the ratio is very good. I am working on my epics, but until then, I am finally satisfied.

Anlorn Redbranch
Ranger of Tunare
51 Seasons
Sol Ro
▲ Page top
WTT for it
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2002 at 6:32 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593362123933
5 posts
I'd like to trade some stuff on Rallos Zek server for this wep: Sarnak Flesh Harvester (7/30 Effect Insidious Fever),Dwarven Axe (6/26),Shiny Brass Shield (AC 10 Magic Resist +10),Elder Wolf Jawbone (11/29 STR,DEX,STA +2,CHA-20,SV FIRE,COLD,MAGIC+2),Netherbian Chitin (AC 20,STR+2,SV FIRE+10,[Chest]),and some Blackened Iron and Alloy armor for Legs,Gloves and Feet.Send Raaggy a tell or email August474@aol.com. Thanks =) I'm also trading all this for a Centi LS,if I can.
▲ Page top
RE: WTT for it
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2002 at 12:58 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591780632917
203 posts
Sarnak Flesh Harvester= 100pp
Dwarven Axe= 10pp
Shiny Brass Shield= 20pp
Elderwolf Jawbone= 500pp
Netherbian Chitin= 200pp
Blackend armor all together= 100pp
100+10+20+500+200+100= 930pp, this item 3000pp, doubt thats quite a fair trade

464 posts
It's a fair trade in Happy-Joy-Joy Land where everyone knows that a ton of worthless crap will always be an acceptable trade for one really nice item!

hello everyone i am a very hhappy merchant today thanks to the new system gui i went in with no tolans and 1400pp and came out with 4 tolans pieces and this beauty for only 1k i luv it and this is made much better due to the fact i have FBSS Woot happy dance ok.

A ***** , A sinner , A lover , a warrior Passsion is life
▲ Page top
I Loved This Sword
QuoteReply
# Jul 21 2002 at 6:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777779283
Scholar
23 posts
This is a totaly awesome weapon. Even with the secondary restriction, its a hard one to replace. I bought mine on the Mithaniel Marr server and only gave it up when I got a set of Centi Swords. I took the stats over the ac bonus once I had improved my armor as well.
▲ Page top
Graphic
QuoteReply
# Apr 25 2002 at 1:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759151560
14 posts
For anyone who doesn't know already:
Graphic is the same as Lamentation 8)
Better in my opinion to use this offhand than
another Lammy.
▲ Page top
Rogue use
QuoteReply
# Nov 22 2001 at 5:40 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591771948127
Scholar
46 posts
Got one of these from a friend on my server for 4k cash. I don't see it being much more than that, in comparision to the "Green Jade Axe" with a similar ratio (17/34) and stats as well as equippable in both hands. I would say 6k on my server, taking everything in consideration (including its look). Mind you, I prefer the 10ac on this weapon slightly better than the stats on the GJA, considering it has neg15sta which isn't fatal but makes a dent. Having a higher damage weapon in the offhand for us rogues is a good idea, it will draw less taunt and still do excellent damage. And it's also nice to see those high slash hits mixed in your piercing spam =) A great choice for any of the compatible classes, in my opinion. /cheer Verant, great new drops!
▲ Page top
RE: Rogue use
QuoteReply
# Dec 01 2001 at 2:21 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591767849790
Scholar
22 posts
You're right, this is about 4k. Remember though that almost any site that has a price ratio it is put together by those that first get the item, and then current. Which means 99 times out of 100, you can immediately cut 1/3 off what is posted. Unless it's something they have modified since (like the monk beeds or manastone)
▲ Page top
Parry Blade = Dmg
QuoteReply
# Nov 16 2001 at 10:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763479785
11 posts
I'm a Ranger and I duel Weild a Wurmy and Sarnak Parry Blade. Together they do a ton of Dmg, especcialy with Double hit. The most Dmg I've dont with the parry blade is 64/60 double hit. With the wurmmy doin double hit for 90/90, add that up and u get 300+ dmg in 2 swings. I like these weps together.

Gegeren Hiddenheart
51 Pathfinder
[Silent Avengers]
Lanys T'Vyl

Edited, Sat Feb 2 12:51:29 2002
▲ Page top
Stabbing
QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2001 at 12:05 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593965935744
View User Forum
6 posts
Backstab, even double backstab, is all done with the primary hand. Slashing in the off-hand doesn't penalize the rogue at all.
▲ Page top
This is an excellent offhand weapon.
QuoteReply
# Oct 13 2001 at 4:06 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592249444106
146 posts
This is truely an excellent offhander, especially for a Rogue or Ranger. It's a tad slow for the Warrior but the ratio is still just fine and I never turn up 10 raw AC in the offhand slot. Slow enough to reduce aggro and damaging enough to be worthwhile... a great addition.
▲ Page top
BS
QuoteReply
# Oct 12 2001 at 5:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762681291
91 posts
It really doesnt matter for BS, since this is offhand anyway. Having a piercer in the primary slot will allow you to backstab with it
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 13 2001 at 12:35 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ok einstein, but you still wont get BS damage from it. read the whole thread of posts so u know what the discussion is about.

# Oct 12 2001 at 1:21 PM Rating: Default

5 posts
now I don't argue when warriors or rangers or bards say that weapons are for them.. but consider this... this weapon is usable by rog's.. the highest damage on any rog piercer is 15 previous to this one.... this one has a higher damage then even our epic.. not to mention a decent ratio.... but hey to each thier own




lol but then again this is an offhander
